name: Johnston Senior Center
description: Programs, meals, and social activities for Johnston seniors. Transportation assistance available.

name: The Bridge at Cherry Hill
description: Assisted living community offering independent and assisted living apartments with resort-style amenities. Named a 2025 U.S. News & World Report best senior living community.

name: Cherry Hill Manor Nursing & Rehabilitation
description: Skilled nursing and rehabilitation center offering short-term rehab and long-term care. Named a U.S. News & World Report 2026 Best Nursing Home.

name: Anchor Bay at Pocasset
description: Senior living community on 16+ acres offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Established in 2004.

name: Briarcliffe Manor
description: 30-acre campus with 5-star-rated skilled nursing and rehabilitation, memory care assisted living, and independent living options.

name: PACE Organization of Rhode Island
description: Nonprofit health plan for adults 55+ with complex health needs who want to remain at home. Provides adult day care, medical care, transportation, meals, and social services.

name: Johnston Town Hall
description: Town government offices including tax assessor, building permits, vital records, and general administration.

name: Tri-County Community Action Agency
description: Food pantry, fuel assistance, and emergency services for individuals and families in need.

name: St. Robert Bellarmine Parish Food Closet
description: Parish food closet serving Johnston residents with non-perishable food items, breads, bakery items, and fresh produce when available. Visitors may come once every five weeks. Bring photo ID and proof of address.

name: Johnston Seventh-day Adventist Church Food Pantry
hours: First 3 Wednesdays of the month, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
description: Community food pantry operated by the Johnston SDA church. Call ahead to confirm hours and availability.

name: Allendale Baptist Church Food Pantry
description: Serves North Providence and Johnston residents at no cost. Handicapped accessible. Donations accepted but no fees charged.

name: The Salvation Army - Providence Corps Food Pantry
description: RI Community Food Bank member agency serving Johnston, Cranston, Providence, and nearby communities. Photo ID required. Guests may visit monthly. Spanish spoken. Handicapped accessible.

name: CCAP Client Choice Food Bank
hours: Mon–Tue, Fri 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM, Wed 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM, Thu 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
description: Client-choice food bank where people shop through a selection process similar to a grocery store. Serves Cranston, Johnston, and surrounding communities.

name: Meals on Wheels of Rhode Island
description: Home-delivered meals for homebound seniors 60+ throughout Rhode Island including Johnston. Also runs a Senior Restaurant Program with vouchers usable at Uncle Tony's Pizza in Johnston.

name: Marian J. Mohr Memorial Library
hours: Mon–Thu 9 AM – 8 PM, Fri–Sat 9 AM – 5 PM
description: Public library offering books, digital resources, community programs, and meeting spaces.

name: Johnston Police Department
description: Full-service municipal police department providing law enforcement, emergency response, and animal control services for the Town of Johnston.

name: Johnston Fire Department — Headquarters
description: Fire department headquarters housing Engine 3, Rescue 3, Ladder 1, and administrative offices. The department operates 4 stations across town.

name: Johnston Department of Public Works
hours: Mon–Thu 7:00 AM – 3:30 PM, Fri 7:00 AM – 2:30 PM
description: Handles road maintenance, sanitary sewer services, snow removal, and infrastructure for the Town of Johnston.

name: Johnston Municipal Court
description: Adjudicates state moving traffic violations and local ordinance offenses including parking, zoning, minimum housing code violations, and animal control matters.

name: Johnston Public Schools — Central Office
description: Administrative headquarters for Johnston Public Schools, overseeing all public schools in the district. Located within the Nicholas A. Ferri Middle School building.

name: US Post Office — Johnston
hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM
description: Full-service United States Postal Service office providing mail services, package shipping, PO boxes, and passport applications.

name: Lollipop Learning Center
description: Licensed childcare center for ages 2 months to 5 years. DCYF-certified with qualified teachers and an on-site nurse. Curriculum focused on language, reading readiness, and physical, social, and emotional development.

name: Johnston Child Care Center
description: Licensed center established in 1996 serving children ages 6 weeks to 12 years. Offers infant/toddler care, preschool, extended care, and summer camp with a 5,000 sq ft outdoor playground.

name: Little Angels Academy Childcare Center
description: Serves children ages 3 months to 5 years with infant, toddler, and preschool programs. Full-time, part-time, and occasional care available.

name: Creative Early Learning Center
description: Childcare for ages 6 weeks to 5 years with a bilingual enrichment program introducing Spanish and Sign Language to children ages 3 to 5.

name: Strawberry Fields Early Learning Academy
description: Private early learning academy serving children ages 6 months to 5 years in a nurturing environment.

name: Scribbles Academy
description: NAEYC-accredited, 5-star BrightStars rated childcare center serving ages 6 weeks to 12 years. Established 1994 with a maximum capacity of 77 children.

name: Dreamland Learning Center
description: Family-owned and operated facility serving children ages 6 weeks to 12 years. Part of a three-location operation across Rhode Island.

name: Over the Rainbow Learning Center
description: Established in 2006, serving children ages 12 months to 12 years. Two locations in Johnston and Providence.

name: Amazing Kids Academy
description: Licensed center-based childcare serving children ages 12 months to 12 years with a maximum capacity of 93 children. Established 2010.

name: Tots' Town Child Care Center
description: Serves children ages 18 months to 12 years with toddler care, preschool, and after-school programs for school-age children.

name: The Schoolhouse Preschool
description: Year-round preschool serving children ages 6 weeks to 5 years.

name: The Farm House Preschool
description: Licensed DCYF center serving children ages 6 weeks to 6 years with infant, toddler, and preschool programs. Maximum capacity of 48 children.

name: Imagination Station Early Learning Center
description: Serves children ages 6 weeks to 12 years. Offers before/after school care, summer camps, and enrichment classes including yoga and cooking.

name: Growing Minds Preschool and Enrichment Center
description: Early learning center for children ages 6 weeks to 5 years emphasizing high-quality inclusive practices for all children regardless of background or ability.

name: TriCounty Head Start - Johnston
description: Free Head Start and Early Head Start programs for pregnant women and children birth to age 5. DCYF-licensed and BrightStars rated. No cost to participate.

name: Operation Stand Down Rhode Island
description: Rhode Island's primary nonprofit resource for homeless and at-risk veterans. Provides emergency and permanent housing, case management, mental health and substance abuse treatment coordination, employment assistance, and a food pantry.

name: Crossroads Rhode Island
hours: Hotline: Mon–Fri 9 AM – 9 PM, Sat–Sun 9 AM – 2 PM
description: Rhode Island's largest homeless services organization. Operates emergency shelters for men, women, families, and couples. Also provides domestic violence services with a 24/7 helpline at (401) 861-2760.

name: Providence Rescue Mission
description: Emergency overnight shelter for homeless men and women. Provides three hot meals daily, warm showers, clean clothing, a food pantry, dental services, and a one-year discipleship program.

name: Amos House
hours: Mon–Thu 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM, Fri 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM
description: Nonprofit providing shelter housing, the state's largest soup kitchen, and social services for individuals who are hungry, homeless, or in crisis. Offers case management, mental health care, and recovery support.

name: Ocean State Medical
hours: Mon–Thu 6:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Fri 7:00 AM – 12:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM
description: Comprehensive primary care practice offering preventative medicine and telehealth services. Patient-Centered Medical Home located inside the Johnston Medical Center.

name: TriCounty Community Health Center
hours: Mon–Wed 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Thu–Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
description: Federally Qualified Health Center offering family medicine, behavioral health, substance abuse treatment, counseling, and dental care. Sliding fee scale available.

name: Brown University Health Urgent Care
hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sat–Sun 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
description: Walk-in urgent care clinic treating adults and children 18 months and older. Offers X-rays, flu and tetanus shots, COVID testing, and sports physicals.

name: Johnston Urgent Care (MDRI)
hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM, Sat 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM
description: Local urgent care treating minor injuries, sprains, fractures, colds, flu, and infections. On-site X-rays, lab testing, and physicals available.

name: Atmed Treatment Center
description: Urgent care providing comprehensive outpatient health care for non-life-threatening illnesses and injuries. Walk-ins welcome, no appointment necessary.

name: Inner You Counseling Center
hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Sat–Sun 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
description: Counseling center offering individual, couples, and family therapy. Accepts all insurances with a sliding scale for uninsured clients.

name: Ellie Mental Health - Johnston
hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
description: Individual, family, and couples therapy for ages 5 and up. Treats anxiety, depression, trauma, substance use, and relationship challenges. In-person and telehealth sessions available.

name: Johnston War Memorial Park
description: 26-acre town park with baseball and softball diamonds, basketball and tennis courts, an ADA-accessible inclusive playground, splash pad, fishing pond, one-mile walking trail, picnic areas, and a veterans memorial.

name: Snake Den State Park
description: 1,000-acre state park featuring hiking trails, open fields, and the historic Dame Farm. A largely undeveloped natural setting ideal for hiking, nature walks, and birdwatching.

name: Buttonhole Golf Course
description: Non-profit 9-hole public golf course on the Johnston border along the Woonasquatucket River Greenway. Focused on youth golf education and accessible play.

name: Woodlake Park Complex & Dog Park
description: Multi-use park with baseball and softball fields, soccer field, renovated playground, and a fenced dog park. Trails wind around Almy Reservoir for approximately 2.5 miles.

name: Cricket Field
description: 2.6-acre park along the Woonasquatucket River with brick walking paths, a wetlands boardwalk, dam overlook, gazebo, canoe/kayak launch, and native plant gardens.

name: Johnston Indoor Recreation Center & Soccer Complex
description: 26,000 sq ft indoor recreation facility hosting wrestling, volleyball, Special Olympics, and more. Adjacent outdoor soccer complex with artificial turf fields.

name: Woonasquatucket River Greenway
description: Paved multi-use trail following the Woonasquatucket River. ADA-accessible, at least 8 feet wide, passing by two large ponds. Free monthly Greenway Wild Walks for families.

name: Deerfield Park
description: Large park in neighboring Smithfield with soccer and lacrosse fields, little league fields, basketball and tennis courts, two playgrounds, a splash pad, hiking trails, and a Veterans Memorial.

name: Smithfield YMCA
hours: Mon–Fri 5:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sat 7:00 AM – 2:00 PM
description: The closest YMCA to Johnston, offering a fitness center, pool, youth programs, swim lessons, summer camp, childcare, personal training, and financial assistance for memberships.

name: CW Theaters, Lanes & Games
description: All-in-one entertainment complex adjacent to Johnston with a 16-screen movie theater, 22 bowling lanes, laser tag, arcade, and full-service restaurant and bar.

name: Apple Cinemas - Warwick Mall
description: 12-screen movie theater with laser projectors, Dolby 7.1 surround sound, luxury reclining seats, and a full bar. About 15 minutes from Johnston.

name: Showcase Cinemas Warwick
description: Modern cinema with luxury recliners, reserved seating, RealD 3D, and XPlus Laser auditorium with Dolby Atmos. Offers Bargain Tuesdays and Senior Wednesdays.

name: Johnston Early Childhood Center
description: Public kindergarten center serving approximately 195 students with a 12:1 student-teacher ratio. Provides a caring and collaborative learning environment.

name: Graniteville School
description: The district's dedicated Pre-K school serving approximately 144 students. Offers Universal Preschool classrooms and integrated classrooms for children with and without developmental disabilities.

name: Brown Avenue Elementary School
description: Public elementary school (grades 1–5) serving approximately 215 students with a 13:1 student-teacher ratio. Offers Multi Language Learners program and Special Services.

name: Sarah Dyer Barnes Elementary School
description: Public elementary school (grades K–5) serving approximately 280 students with a 10:1 student-teacher ratio. The only K–5 elementary in the district.

name: Thornton Elementary School
description: Public elementary school (grades 1–5) serving approximately 346 students with a 12:1 student-teacher ratio.

name: Winsor Hill Elementary School
description: Public elementary school (grades 1–5) serving approximately 380 students with a 12:1 student-teacher ratio.

name: Nicholas A. Ferri Middle School
description: The district's sole middle school (grades 6–8). Offers STEAM programs, languages, fine arts, computer science, 1-to-1 device integration, and interscholastic sports.

name: Johnston Senior High School
description: The district's sole high school (grades 9–12). Offers CTE programs, STEAM academies, 8 AP classes, and pathways in Law and Public Safety. Features 300+ student athletes.

name: St. Rocco School
description: Roman Catholic parochial school (grades PK–8) associated with St. Rocco Parish. Serves approximately 177 students with an 11:1 student-teacher ratio.

name: Trinity Christian Academy
description: Private Christian school (grades PK–12) and ministry of Trinity Assembly of God. Serves approximately 70 students with an 8:1 student-teacher ratio.

name: Atwood Grill
hours: Sun–Thu 11:30 AM – 8:00 PM, Fri–Sat 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM
description: Laid-back Italian bar and grill serving pastas, Angus burgers, and pizza with a full bar. A Johnston institution serving over 100,000 customers a year.

name: Bar'Lino Ristorante
hours: Mon–Wed 12:00 PM – 9:30 PM, Thu–Sat 12:00 PM – 10:00 PM, Sun 10:30 AM – 9:30 PM
description: Southern Italian ristorante from the DeQuattro Restaurant Group featuring familial recipes from Itri, Italy. Signature dishes include Pappardelle alla Bolognese and Bucatini all'Amatriciana.

name: Luigi's Gourmet Italian Restaurant
hours: Wed–Thu 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM, Fri–Sat 12:00 PM – 9:30 PM, Sun 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM
description: Family-owned Italian restaurant since 1971 with two beautifully appointed dining rooms and a full bar. Also offers a Gourmet Express with takeout soups, sandwiches, pizza, and pasta dinners.

name: Trattoria Romana Johnston
hours: Wed–Thu 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM, Fri 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Sat 4:30 PM – 10:00 PM, Sun 4:00 PM – 8:00 PM
description: Authentic Italian dining from Chef Luciano Canova at the Centre at Cherry Hill. Offers dinner, lunch, banquets, and a special Sunday service in an intimate setting with picturesque murals.

name: The Chicken Coop Kitchen & Bar
hours: Mon–Thu 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM, Fri–Sat 11:30 AM – 1:00 AM, Sun 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM
description: Locally owned bar and grill since 2021 serving fresh food, craft beer, and specialty cocktails in a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere.

name: The Ave Bar and Grill
description: Lively bar and grill specializing in unique burgers and unforgettable pizzas. Features 2 full bars, a dance floor, pool tables, shuffleboard, and more.

name: Sura Korean BBQ
hours: Sun–Thu 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Fri–Sat 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM
description: Authentic Korean cuisine since 1997. The only place in Rhode Island where Korean marinated barbecues are cooked and served right on your tabletop grill. Offers all-you-can-eat BBQ.

name: Cherry Hill Grille & Pub
hours: Wed–Thu 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM, Fri 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM, Sat 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Sun 7:00 AM – 1:00 PM
description: Cozy 50-seat neighborhood pub featuring comfort food, HD TVs, draft beer, cocktails, and outstanding daily specials. Locally owned and operated since 2009.

name: Pat's Italian Restaurant
hours: Tue–Thu 4:30 PM – 8:30 PM, Fri–Sat 4:30 PM – 9:00 PM, Sun 4:30 PM – 7:30 PM
description: Authentic Italian restaurant offering classic dishes in a warm setting. Part of the Pat's Italian family with multiple Rhode Island locations. Reservations, delivery, and takeout available.

name: The Punjab Indian & Himalayan Cuisine
hours: Mon 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Wed 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Thu 11:30 AM – 8:00 PM, Fri–Sat 11:00 AM – 9:45 PM, Sun 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM
description: Authentic Indian and Himalayan cuisine celebrating traditional recipes, spices, and heartfelt hospitality. Offers lunch, dinner, buffets, takeout, and catering.

name: Baylee Thai Cuisine
hours: Mon 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM, Tue–Thu 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Fri–Sat 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM, Sun 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM
description: Authentic Thai cuisine using fresh ingredients and traditional spices. Offers dine-in, delivery, and takeout with a diverse menu of classic Thai dishes.

name: Café Vino
hours: Tue–Thu 5:00 PM – 9:00 PM, Fri–Sat 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM
description: Intimate BYOB Italian restaurant focusing on high-quality local products and simple recipes to produce spectacular dishes. A cozy hidden gem rated 4.8 stars.

name: English Muffin
hours: Mon–Thu 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM, Fri 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sat–Sun 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM
description: Beloved breakfast, lunch, and dinner restaurant serving American comfort food. Breakfast served daily until 2 PM with Friday dinner service until 8 PM.

name: Cayenne Sushi Restaurant
hours: Mon–Thu 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Fri 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM
description: Authentic Japanese, Chinese, and Thai cuisine with a focus on creative sushi rolls and Asian fusion dishes. Dine-in, takeout, and delivery available.

name: Hei Place
hours: Mon–Thu 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Fri 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM
description: Pan-Asian restaurant offering Chinese, Japanese, Thai, Vietnamese, and Cambodian cuisines. A diverse menu featuring dishes from across Southeast Asia.
